meta.title: GoTogether — Digital Software Studio | Web, Mobile & AI
meta.description: GoTogether is a digital software studio. We design and build web apps, mobile apps, backends, and AI integrations — from idea to launch.
meta.keywords: software development, web development, Next.js, mobile apps, Flutter, AI integration, UI/UX design, DevOps, Uzbekistan, digital agency
meta.og_alt: GoTogether — we build digital products people love

hero.tagline: We build digital products people love
hero.subtitle: From idea to launch — web, mobile, and AI. We design and engineer software that moves your business forward.

services.title: Services built to ship
services.subtitle: End-to-end product engineering across the modern stack.
services.card1_desc: Fast, scalable web apps with Next.js and React.
services.card2_desc: Native-quality apps with Flutter, iOS and Android.
services.card3_desc: Robust services with Node.js and PostgreSQL.
services.card4_desc: Research-driven design and prototyping in Figma.
services.card5_desc: LLM features and automation wired into your product.
services.card6_desc: Docker, CI/CD and cloud infra that just works.

showcases.title: Products we have shipped
showcases.subtitle: A few of the projects we are proud of.
showcases.desc_art_lavka: E-commerce platform for exclusive designer t-shirts in Uzbekistan, with real-time Telegram order integration.
showcases.desc_ketamiz_web: Intercity ride-sharing platform connecting travellers across Uzbekistan with affordable trips.
showcases.desc_dadi: Site for a marketing agency & video studio — bold ideas and professional video production.
showcases.desc_ketamiz_mobile: Cross-platform mobile app for intercity ride-sharing, available for iOS and Android.
showcases.desc_fajka: Website and digital menu for a modern bar & lounge, built for a fast, immersive experience.
showcases.desc_fergana_hotel: Booking and presentation website for a hotel in Fergana, Uzbekistan.

team.title: Meet the team
team.subtitle: A small, senior crew that ships together.
team.bio_ramziddin: Turns ambitious ideas into shipped products across web and AI.
team.bio_botirjon: Software engineer building reliable, well-crafted web and mobile products.
team.bio_diyorbek: Drives growth and brand reach, connecting our products with the people who need them.

contact.title: Let’s build something together
